concepts_used.title: 最短路径算法（Dijkstra、Floyd）
concepts_used.how_used: 使用匈牙利算法（Hungarian Algorithm）为每架无人机分配显示位置，最小化总飞行距离，本质上是求解二分图的最小权完美匹配。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: a Python script uses the Hungarian Algorithm to compute the shortest set of paths between the grid location and the initial points of the display.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 分析了风速对无人机路径的影响，指出当风速超过11.72 m/s时无人机可能偏离路径，并建议在恶劣天气下取消表演。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We have noted that a wind speed of more than 11.72 m/s can cause our drones to fail to follow their paths and potentially crash.

concepts_used.title: 动态/动画展示
concepts_used.how_used: 使用MATLAB和Python算法生成无人机运动的动画，展示每个显示中无人机的路径和动态效果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Our model computed the position and velocity of the drones in each of these phases and generated an animation of drone movement for each display.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出了四个假设：天气条件适宜、无人机最大水平速度16 m/s、最大垂直速度3 m/s、最大加速度3.725 m/s²，并给出了合理依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption: The light show occurs during favorable weather conditions for drone flight. ... Drones cannot move faster than 16 m/s horizontally or 3 m/s vertically. ... Drones have a maximum acceleration of 3.725 m/s2.

concepts_used.title: MATLAB 编程基础
concepts_used.how_used: 使用MATLAB进行数学建模和路径计算，生成无人机运动的动画。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We mathematically modeled the paths that each of these drones would take in performing a display demonstration using both MATLAB and Python algorithms.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分包括问题重述（Problem Restatement）和问题分析（Analysis of the Problem），介绍了背景、研究目标和所用无人机型号。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1 Introduction 1.1 Problem Restatement ... 1.2 Analysis of the Problem

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 描述了表演所需空域为圆柱体，底面半径250米，高度10-115米，并建议观众保持15米安全距离，涉及空间可视化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The show will require an airspace in the shape of a cylinder whose base radius is 250 meters and whose height ranges from 10 m to 115 m from the ground, with a 15 m perimeter around it to ensure viewer safety.
